text.title: Exploratory Testing Charters Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Exploratory Testing Charters end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: draft-charter
step.action: Write one-sentence mission, declare timebox, list ≥3 threats.

step.name: execute-session
step.action: Run the session; capture issues + notes as you go, do NOT defer.

step.name: debrief
step.action: Fill the debrief schema; convert un-repro'able findings to open questions.

step.name: triage-followups
step.action: File issues, schedule next charter, or close out.
